title: Capabilities and Image Tool Execution
description: Agent uses capability-based tools (e.g., view_image) to inspect visual content inside a sandbox workspace.
use_cases: UC1: Configure sandbox capabilities (Capabilities.default() + optional extras)
UC2: Bind capability to sandbox session (Capability.bind(session))
UC3: Expose image tool to agent (Filesystem.tools() → [ViewImageTool, SandboxApplyPatchTool])
UC4: Invoke view_image tool with path argument
UC5: Resolve workspace path (absolute or relative)
UC6: Read image file from sandbox session
UC8: Encode image as base64 data URL
UC9: Return ToolOutputImage to the model
UC10: Handle error — file not found
UC11: Handle error — unsupported file type
UC12: Handle error — image exceeds 10 MB size limit
relationships: Filesystem composes ViewImageTool (instantiates with session + run_as user)
SandboxAgent.capabilities includes Filesystem (and optionally Skills, etc.)
UC7 extends UC11 (MIME detection fails → unsupported)
UC8 depends on UC7 (MIME type required for data URL prefix)

class_vars.tool_description: Loads an image from the sandbox workspace and returns it as a structured image output.

fields: path: str (min_length=1, absolute or relative workspace path)

tool_execution_flow: 9. Guard: mime_type is None → return error string
error_cases: FileNotFoundError | WorkspaceReadNotFoundError → 'image path `{display_path}` was not found'
General read exception → 'unable to read image at `{display_path}`: {ExcType}'
TypeError from _coerce_payload_bytes → 'unable to read image at ...: {exc}'
len(payload) > 10MB → 'image path ... exceeded the allowed size of 10MB; resize or compress ...'
MIME detection failure → 'image path ... is not a supported image file'
security_notes: Error messages use relative display_path, never provider-internal absolute paths
needs_approval callback can gate tool calls on path patterns (e.g., 'sensitive/' prefix)
user identity propagated from capability.run_as → session.read(user=...)
integration_context: SandboxAgent sets capabilities=[...] at construction time
At run time, Runner binds session to each capability via capability.bind(session)
Capability.tools() is called to generate the live tool list for the model
view_image tool name appears in SandboxAgent instructions as a callable tool
